Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be performed after SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time for SW-EIC Reject across all variants ending with SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and activity SW-EIC Reject for cases where activity SW-EIC Reject occurs

Name: Total resolution time of SW-EIC Reject in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurred
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject compared to the time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-AE Recommendation overdue and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be done after the last reviewer activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time of SW-EIC Reject measured from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in rejected submissions
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-EIC Reject in direct-rejection variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-EIC Reject in variants that skip reviewer assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-EIC Reject in cases where no reviewer ever agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer No Response and SW-EIC Reject when no alternative reviewers are assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time for SW-EIC Reject following a sequence that includes Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time between SW–Major Revision due in 1 week and SW-EIC Reject in revision cycles preceding rejection
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 week'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject'", 'aggregation': 'minimum'}"
